description: FrootAI Enterprise RAG — Guardrail hooks for policy enforcement

hooks.description: Block tool execution if it would write secrets to tracked files
hooks.message: 🔴 BLOCKED: Detected potential secret in code. Use Azure Key Vault references or managed identity instead.

hooks.description: Warn if modifying guardrails.json to lower safety thresholds
hooks.message: ⚠️ WARNING: You are modifying guardrails configuration. Ensure PII, toxicity, and off-topic filters remain active.

hooks.description: Log all file modifications for audit trail
On Azure deployment failure, suggest troubleshooting steps
hooks.message:
💡 Deployment failed. Common fixes:
1. Check quota: az vm list-usage --location eastus2
2. Check RBAC: az role assignment list --resource-group rg-enterprise-rag
3. Check network: verify private endpoint DNS resolution
